primary_definition.label: ranking_based_upset
primary_definition.description: A match where the lower-ranked team wins or draws against a higher-ranked opponent with specified gap thresholds
criteria: lower_ranked_draws AND rank_gap >= 25 AND higher_ranked in top_15
primary_definition.notes: Pre-tournament FIFA rankings used as baseline. 'rank_gap' = lower_rank - higher_rank (positive when underdog is lower-ranked).

minor.label: Minor upset
minor.description: Lower-ranked team wins with moderate ranking gap

historic.label: Historic upset
historic.description: One of the biggest upsets in World Cup history

giant_killing.description: Small football nation defeats a traditional powerhouse

group_surprise.description: Upset occurring in group stage play

defending_champion_collapse.criteria: is_defending_champion = true AND stage = group AND is_upset_against = true
defending_champion_collapse.description: Defending champion loses in group stage

asian_rise.criteria: lower_ranked_confederation = AFC AND higher_ranked_rank <= 10 AND is_upset = true
asian_rise.description: Asian team defeats a top-10 ranked opponent

african_breakthrough.criteria: lower_ranked_confederation = CAF AND higher_ranked_rank <= 10 AND is_upset = true
african_breakthrough.description: African team defeats a top-10 opponent or reaches unprecedented stage
